theorem.name: rollback_recovery_correctness_theorem
theorem.statement: Given theorem-daemon checkpoints, admissible update guards, and bounded rollback error, the recovery operator returns the system to a theorem-consistent frontier without destroying core readout, survival, and online-learning invariants.
theorem.main_risk: Current proof support is anchored in prototype snapshots and block-level daemon cycles; full project-wide global rollback correctness is still pending.
